description:
An Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) is a comprehensive service plan designed to ensure the continuous upkeep and optimal performance of assets such as landscaping, irrigation systems, green walls, ponds, or other facilities. Under an AMC, scheduled visits are carried out for inspection, preventive maintenance, repairs, and replacements (as per contract terms).

This service helps in identifying issues early, reducing unexpected breakdowns, and maintaining consistent quality. AMC plans are customizable based on the client’s needs, covering routine activities like cleaning, servicing, pruning, fertilization, and system checks. It offers convenience, cost savings, and peace of mind by ensuring professional care throughout the year.

features.title: Scheduled maintenance visits throughout the year
Preventive maintenance and regular inspections
Repair and replacement support (as per agreement)
Covers multiple services (landscape, irrigation, etc.)

shortDescription: An Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) is a service agreement that provides regular maintenance and support for systems, equipment, or landscapes over a fixed period, typically one year.
title: Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)

description:
Fish pond maintenance focuses on keeping the pond ecosystem stable and healthy through routine cleaning, water quality management, and fish care. This includes removing debris, controlling algae growth, checking filtration systems, and maintaining proper oxygen levels in the water.

Regular monitoring of pH levels, temperature, and nutrient balance is essential to prevent diseases and ensure the well-being of fish. The service may also include feeding guidance, inspection of pumps and aerators, and seasonal adjustments. Proper maintenance not only enhances the visual appeal of the pond but also supports a thriving aquatic life system.

features.title: Water quality testing and management
Removal of debris and sludge cleaning
Algae control and prevention
Fish health monitoring and care guidance
Monitoring of pH, temperature, and oxygen levels
Regular inspection and maintenance schedules

shortDescription: Fish pond maintenance involves regular care and management of ponds to ensure clean water, healthy fish, and a balanced aquatic environment.
title: Fish Pond Maintenance

description:
Tree plantation is the process of selecting, planting, and nurturing trees in residential, commercial, or public spaces. It includes site assessment, choosing suitable tree species based on soil, climate, and purpose (shade, fruit, ornamental), and proper planting techniques to ensure healthy growth.

The process also involves preparing the soil, digging pits, adding nutrients, and ensuring proper spacing between trees. After planting, initial care such as watering, mulching, and protection from pests and animals is essential for successful establishment. Tree plantation contributes to improved air quality, temperature regulation, biodiversity, and overall environmental sustainability.

features.title: Selection of suitable tree species
Proper pit digging and soil preparation
Initial watering and care setup
Use of fertilizers and organic nutrients

shortDescription: Tree plantation involves planting and establishing trees to enhance environmental quality, improve greenery, and support ecological balance.
title: Tree Plantation

description:
A vertical green wall, also known as a living wall, involves installing plants on specially designed vertical structures mounted on walls, both indoors and outdoors. These systems use soil-based or hydroponic setups with integrated irrigation to support plant growth in a vertical orientation.

Vertical green walls are ideal for urban spaces where horizontal space is limited. They not only add a modern and refreshing visual appeal but also help in reducing indoor temperatures, improving air quality, and providing sound insulation. The installation process includes structural setup, plant selection based on light conditions, irrigation system integration, and ongoing maintenance planning.

features.title: Space-efficient vertical planting solution
Suitable for indoor and outdoor walls
Integrated irrigation and drainage systems
Variety of plant options based on environment

shortDescription: A vertical green wall is a space-saving landscaping solution where plants are grown on vertically structured panels to enhance aesthetics and improve air quality.
title: Vertical Green Wall

description:
Potted plants installation focuses on beautifying spaces by strategically placing plants in decorative containers suitable for homes, offices, balconies, terraces, and commercial areas. The process includes selecting the right plants based on lighting conditions, space availability, and aesthetic preferences, along with choosing appropriate pots, soil mixtures, and drainage systems.

This service also considers plant combinations, color coordination, and placement patterns to create visually appealing arrangements. Proper installation ensures plant health, easy maintenance, and optimal growth. It’s an ideal solution for adding greenery in areas where traditional landscaping is not feasible.

features.title: Selection of suitable indoor and outdoor plants
Decorative pot and container arrangements
Placement based on sunlight and space conditions
Aesthetic plant combinations and design layouts

shortDescription: Potted plants installation involves selecting, arranging, and placing plants in containers to enhance indoor and outdoor spaces with greenery.
title: Potted Plants Installation

description:
Drip irrigation services involve the design, installation, and maintenance of systems that deliver water slowly and precisely to the base of plants through a network of pipes, valves, tubing, and emitters. This method ensures that water reaches the root zone directly, reducing evaporation and runoff.

It is especially beneficial for gardens, lawns, agricultural fields, and landscaped areas where water conservation is important. Drip irrigation systems can be customized based on plant types, soil conditions, and terrain. These services also include system monitoring, clog prevention, and periodic maintenance to ensure optimal performance and longevity.

features.title: Targeted water delivery to plant roots
Reduces water wastage and evaporation
Custom-designed irrigation layouts
Installation of pipes, emitters, and control systems

shortDescription: Drip irrigation services provide efficient water delivery directly to plant roots, minimizing water wastage and promoting healthy plant growth.
title: Drip Irrigation Services

description:
Regular plant and tree maintenance involves ongoing care practices to keep greenery healthy, safe, and visually appealing. This includes watering, pruning, trimming, fertilizing, pest and disease management, and soil care. Proper maintenance helps plants grow stronger, improves flowering and fruiting, and prevents the spread of diseases.

For trees, services also include structural pruning, removal of dead or hazardous branches, and monitoring overall tree health to avoid risks. These services are tailored based on plant types, seasonal requirements, and environmental conditions. Regular upkeep not only enhances the beauty of the landscape but also ensures safety and sustainability over time.

features.title: Routine watering and irrigation management
Pruning and trimming of plants and trees
Fertilization for healthy growth and flowering
Tree health inspection and risk assessment

shortDescription: Regular plant and tree maintenance services ensure the healthy growth, appearance, and longevity of plants and trees through routine care and monitoring.
title: Regular Plant and Tree Maintenance Services

description:
Landscape planning and execution involves creating a well-structured outdoor environment by combining natural elements like plants, lawns, water features, and hardscape elements such as pathways, patios, and walls. The planning phase includes site analysis, conceptual design, plant selection, and layout planning based on climate, soil conditions, and client preferences.

Execution involves turning the design into reality through activities like land grading, planting, irrigation installation, construction of hardscapes, and lighting setup. The goal is to create a balanced, visually appealing, and functional outdoor space that aligns with both aesthetic goals and practical usage, whether for residential gardens, commercial spaces, or public landscapes.

features.title: Site analysis and customized landscape design
Selection of plants, trees, and greenery
Irrigation system setup
End-to-end project execution and supervision

shortDescription: Landscape planning and execution is the process of designing and implementing outdoor spaces to enhance aesthetics, functionality, and environmental sustainability.
title: Landscape planning and execution

description:
Lawn development and maintenance involves both establishing a new lawn and ensuring its continuous health and appearance through regular upkeep. The development phase includes soil preparation, leveling, selecting suitable grass varieties, fertilization, and either seeding or turf installation.

Once the lawn is established, maintenance services ensure it remains lush and vibrant. This includes regular mowing, watering, fertilization, weed control, aeration, and pest management. The service is customized based on climate conditions, soil type, and usage patterns to maintain durability and aesthetics.

The goal is to create a well-balanced lawn that not only enhances the visual appeal of the property but also provides a clean, usable outdoor space.

features.title: Complete lawn setup (soil prep, seeding, turfing)
Regular mowing and trimming
Efficient watering and irrigation management
Fertilization and soil health improvement

shortDescription: Lawn development and maintenance is a complete service that covers the creation and ongoing care of healthy, green lawns for long-term beauty and sustainability.
title: Lawn Development and Maintenance
